textByHash.2a02492e95a0a54d3094b44c747930f4c9345b78: I haven't forgotten that I promised to pay you for your help. Is this a good time for that?
textByHash.2e938d9ec4da09f32c24f44a0632adf481eea96a: Please could you go see , for us? You can get another job once you have furnished his home.
textByHash.302aa2168bc0ce019ae70182eb12546b485f9075: Dad lives in the south-east of Varrock, west of Aubury's Rune Shop. His name's Yarlo. Old Man Yarlo, they call him. He's sure to be at home, so keep looking around.
textByHash.370590e4ad0712a13b0115ea2be3eb38e27ea324: You're currently on a . Go see , . You can get another job once you have furnished his home.
textByHash.38156889e1a1a7dda03057cc33123e6fb28e149d: Basically, he's not really meant to be there. And we'd prefer that the landlord not find out, so we're keeping this job off the record. I'll pay you myself.
textByHash.3c228c4b902b2ac0cd4c2838074dae3ce0d2af8b: This is one of the branches for Mahogany Homes, Gielinor's first construction company.
textByHash.5102a949b243224afca2711c51edeb628cbc7df1: Now, I can't spare very much money, but I've got some supplies in this crate that might help with your own Construction work.
textByHash.5a29e8606f7a49845eac13acd2aeb201c3004ae1: I've included some handy spell tablets that'll take you to your house, to cut down on the walking a bit, as well as one for visiting my boss in Falador. Now, let me tell you some tricks of the trade too...
textByHash.684c0f4cde37bbd273acb9216fdbcd1b69982774: Oh, we redecorate people's houses, fixing things and building new furniture. Mending cabinets, building new chairs and tables - things like that.
textByHash.7315c6ff4af0ecfd11741d6113b05e50bac98986: We can't hire you for that kind of work now, but perhaps you could do me a little favour instead, if you're willing. I can pay!
textByHash.737b89f451490b2a776b59fa5bfc51a509663047: Normally a new house costs 1,000 coins, so that's a bit of a saving. Also, I've got a crate of supplies to help you decorate it.
textByHash.7906d0cd0bc770f72e44d57c09819029c6d1e210: You're currently on a . Go see , . You can get another job once you have furnished her home.
textByHash.9e663d67c818bfa6cd2854ef24a845dd6950179e: Now, I can't spare very much money, but I've persuaded the Estate Agent to let me give you a house of your own. You'll be able to decorate it, like you did for my dad's house.
textByHash.9ed27f4f4aa66715751fc003411ebbe9b259956a: Fabulous! Dad lives in the south-east of Varrock, west of Aubury's Rune Shop. His name's Yarlo. Old Man Yarlo, they call him.
textByHash.b13b8e6c3d30e925b46dbf545b05a1e32aa16cd8: Hey, how can I help you?
textByHash.b40d70f96275a8c38779bacd0775af9f90891f26: That's wonderful news! Dad's going to be so much happier. I'm very grateful! Now, I promised to pay you for your work...
textByHash.b671279947d8acf9555c67d526fdc6934e8d3b02: Some kind of economic downturn wiped out his pension plans. It happens more often than you'd think. But I'd rather not talk about it. Can you help him, though?
textByHash.c41447ed9d93f89ff9c766c6482d2ad7f55aa0a1: Please could you go see , for us? You can get another job once you have furnished her home.
textByHash.c9feb01dbc3e5fb6918083fce33153f999db155c: Hello - it's lovely to see a Mahogany Homes contractor on their rounds! Now, can I help you with something? Or might you be able to do me a little favour?
textByHash.d51d9b7fe2bc0efbeb3bd1fd6453f29c6d507c25: See, my dad just - um - found the house. No-one was using it, so he just settled in. It's all perfectly harmless, and he's a sick old man anyway, so...
textByHash.d6552bce31f2e9f1e7bdd3ed73c514c3bc5a6a5c: Well, you see, it's about my dad. His house is really decrepit. I need someone to rip out the broken furniture and build him some better stuff. I'll pay you if you do it.
textByHash.d952e147ee9fc6fb98ff45a9b4244e43f6ab7900: What kind of contract would you like?
textByHash.e8820b98445c926c679e87d840daa200a1f13053: I've included some handy spell tablets that'll take you to your house, to cut down on the walking a bit, as well as one for visiting my boss in Falador. Let me tell you some tricks of the trade too...
textByHash.eb7857d296db4858bc79a0a1936362560b70df57: If you go see Amy in the Falador branch, she'll fill you in. Her office is just east of the Estate Agent in Falador.
textByHash.ec2495e7642a6720910af79c3efb26b626c5026a: How are you getting on with helping my dad?
textByHash.ee631ee84a1c94251075814574a852b8d18c6d87: Nothing too hard. You'll have to rip out the broken furniture, then build replacements. Dad will talk you through it - he's a retired carpenter himself. He loves talking about construction.
textByHash.f534f69533b710b80e5055ccbe2146042bf5f9be: When a client hires us to redecorate their house, we send a builder round to do the job, and we ensure the builder's paid for their work.
textByHash.fbb9423bbcbe1eb8fcb4cad172058c30d8e44e9c: I'm so sorry, but you're not qualified to do contracts for Mahogany Homes yet. Just keep helping my dad, for now, and perhaps I can sort that out for you.
